sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْكافِي ضَرُورِيٌّ لِرَاحَةِ الْعَقْلِ وَالْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za odmor uma i tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Sufficient sleep is necessary for the rest of the mind and body.

sentences.arabic: يَنَامُ الطِّفْلُ ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete spava osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: The child sleeps eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَيْقِظُ النَّاسُ بَعْدَ الرَّاحَةِ بِنَشَاطٍ وَقُوَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se nakon odmora bude s energijom i snagom.
sentences.translationEn: People wake up after rest with energy and strength.
